title: Bureau runtime automation baseline
goal: Make Bureau self-maintaining for observation, reconciliation and status projection without granting hidden authority to merge, delete, verify or dispatch unsafe work.
completion: Bureau has an explicit local automation model for reconciliation, GitHub observation, status projection, webhook ingestion and optional dispatch.
GitHub PR, review, CI and merge facts are imported as source-attributed evidence rather than manually maintained status fields.
No automation introduced by this initiative has merge, cleanup or completion authority without a separate evidence-bound gate.
